mapper.select: SELECT pt.task_id AS taskId, pt.task_type AS taskType, pt.task_name AS title, pt.task_desc AS subtitle, pt.is_required AS isRequired, IF(utr.record_id IS NOT NULL, 1, 0) AS isDone, COALESCE(cm.url, pt.task_url, '') AS taskUrl FROM t_plan_task pt LEFT JOIN t_course_material cm ON pt.material_id = cm.material_id LEFT JOIN t_user_task_record utr ON pt.task_id = utr.task_id AND utr.user_id = #{userId} AND utr.is_done = 1 WHERE pt.task_id = #{taskId} AND pt.is_deleted = 0
